calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-26-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Vanessa V. Murillo on June 22, 2020 and has been continued a number of times to today, October 26, 2020.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kurtiss A. Jacobs, Esq. appeared for plaintiff TD Bank USA, N.A.
Donald Warner, Senior Agency Relations Business Partner/Custodian of Records for Target Enterprise Inc., witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Jacobs and Warner appeared via Zoom Video Conference for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Vanessa V. Murillo.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on July 5, 2019.
Substitute Service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Vanessa V. Murillo occurred on July 30, 2019, and was effectuated on August 9, 2019.
Defendant Vanessa V. Murillo's Answer to the Complaint was filed August 9, 2019
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on February 7, 2020, setting Trial for June 22, 2020.
Assigned to D514 on June 22, 2020 and continued to July 27, 2020 at the request of Adam Kidd, Esq., counsel for plaintiff; on July 27, 2020, matter was continued to September 14, 2020.
Order Granting Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for defendant Vanessa V. Murillo was filed on September 4, 2020.
On September 14, 2020, matter was continued to today, October 26, 2020 at the request of plaintiff's counsel, Kurtiss A. Jacobs Esq., for Notice.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff TD Bank USA, N.A. and against the defendant Vanessa V. Murillo, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,375.09 - Amount Pled in Complaint
Costs - $284.50.

Total - $1,659.59.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-14-2020 Continued To Oct-26-20 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 514

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Stanley R. Apps's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for DEFENDANT VANESSA MURILLO is Granted. No opposition filed. Counsel for the movant is required to prepare/submit a proposed order on the mandatory Judicial Council form which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Curtis E Karnow, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/CEK)
